caption: A large white airplane with red and blue stripes along its fuselage is parked on a tarmac, with a boarding staircase attached to its side. A red carpet extends from the stairs across the ground. Several men in dark suits are present; one man walks away from the plane along the carpet, and others stand or walk in the background. A man in a dark blue pilot's uniform with gold stripes on his sleeves stands at the base of the stairs, facing the others. In the upper right corner of each frame, a red and white logo reads "13". As the sequence progresses, a man in a suit approaches the pilot, eventually raising his hand in a greeting. The people shift positions slightly as they move across the tarmac, but the overall setting and the plane remain static.
